project.name: REQUIRED: Your project name as it should appear in agent prompts
project.description: REQUIRED: One sentence describing what the project does and who it is for

techStack: REQUIRED: List your full stack, e.g. 'Next.js 14+ (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, Stripe'
conventions: REQUIRED: List 3-7 coding conventions agents must follow
e.g. 'camelCase for variables/functions, PascalCase for components/classes'
e.g. 'Server Components by default, use client only when needed'

docs.epicBrief: OPTIONAL: Path to epic/feature brief for documentation-first phase, e.g. 'docs/epic-v2.md'

build.buildCommand: The command agents run to verify builds, e.g. 'npm run build'
build.lintCommand: The command agents run to check code quality, e.g. 'npm run lint'

testing.applicationUrl: OPTIONAL: URL where the deployed app is accessible for browser-based tests (UAT, Smoke, etc.), e.g. 'http://localhost:3000'

devServer.startCommand: OPTIONAL: Command to start the dev server, e.g. 'npm run dev'

testing.mcpConfig: OPTIONAL: Path to MCP server config for browser testing, e.g. 'templates/mcp-puppeteer.json'
